package rulefixtures

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"io"
	gin "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	binding "github.com/gin-gonic/gin/binding"
)

// scenario for servefile_via_readfile_then_c_data: Handlers that load files into memory and then write them through gin.Context.Data(...) instead of using file helpers or streaming.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: gin; severity: contextual.
type Rule336PositiveRecord struct {
	Name string `json:"name"`
}

func scenario336Positive(ctx *gin.Context) error {
	var first Rule336PositiveRecord
	if err := ctx.ShouldBindBodyWith(&first, binding.JSON); err != nil {
		return err
	}
	body, err := io.ReadAll(ctx.Request.Body)
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	data, err := json.Marshal(gin.H{"item": first, "raw": string(body)})
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	ctx.Data(200, "application/json", data)
	return nil
}
